challenges.title: Hover Zoom Card
challenges.description: Create a card that zooms to 1.1x when hovered.

challenges.title: Active Press Button
challenges.description: Create a button that scales down to 0.9 when pressed.
challenges.expected_outcome: Button shrinks on press, returns on release.

challenges.title: Image Gallery with Hover Zoom
challenges.description: Create a grid of images that enlarge on hover with a smooth transition.
challenges.hint: Set overflow: hidden on parent, scale image inside on hover.
challenges.expected_outcome: Images zoom in smoothly on hover without overflowing.

solution.css: .gallery-item { overflow: hidden; } .gallery-item img { transition: scale 0.4s ease; } .gallery-item:hover img { scale: 1.15; }

challenges.title: Pulse Animation
challenges.description: Create a pulsing circle that scales up and down continuously.

solution.css: @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { scale: 1; } 50% { scale: 1.2; } } .pulse { animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; }

challenges.title: Bounce Reveal Animation
challenges.description: Create an element that starts at scale 0 and bounces to scale 1 with an elastic timing function.
challenges.hint: Use a custom cubic-bezier with scale from 0 to 1.
challenges.expected_outcome: Element bounces into view from zero size.

solution.css: @keyframes bounceIn { 0% { scale: 0; } 50% { scale: 1.15; } 70% { scale: 0.95; } 100% { scale: 1; } } .el { animation: bounceIn 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55); }
